name: year offset range no duplicate base years
description: Verifies that year_offset range columns do not expand base_years and do not produce a redundant LEFT JOIN when no WHERE filter exists on the offset column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "tf43d33db80d44ffef7d19938f615ed8a" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", COUNT(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as rush_atts_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t546eb2449036356a99b8e19a6bc73561" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", COUNT(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as rush_atts_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025, 2026) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "tf43d33db80d44ffef7d19938f615ed8a"."rush_atts_from_plays" AS "rush_atts_from_plays_0", (SELECT SUM(t546eb2449036356a99b8e19a6bc73561.rush_atts_from_plays) FROM t546eb2449036356a99b8e19a6bc73561 WHERE t546eb2449036356a99b8e19a6bc73561.pid = player.pid AND t546eb2449036356a99b8e19a6bc73561.year BETWEEN player_years.year + 1 AND player_years.year + 30) AS "rush_atts_from_plays_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tf43d33db80d44ffef7d19938f615ed8a" on "tf43d33db80d44ffef7d19938f615ed8a"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tf43d33db80d44ffef7d19938f615ed8a"."year" = 2024 where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "tf43d33db80d44ffef7d19938f615ed8a"."rush_atts_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
